title: Topcoder Community App - Apply universal navigation to account settings page
summary: This task involves applying universal navigation to the account settings page of the Topcoder Community App. The changes need to be made against the `universal_nav` branch at commit hash 51ec2f10. The implementation must align with the requirements specified in the linked issue.

artifacts.patch_diff_unified: TBD – missing unified diff of the changes made.

file_plan.change: Update styles to accommodate new navigation.

risks: Changes may not integrate well with existing components.
Potential for breaking existing functionality in the account settings page.

assumptions: The developer has access to the Topcoder Community App repository.
The developer is familiar with ReactJS and the structure of the community app.
The developer can deploy the app locally to test changes.
plan: Review the requirements specified in the GitHub issue #6780.
Implement the universal navigation changes in the account settings page.
Test the changes locally to ensure they function as expected.
Create a git patch file against commit hash 51ec2f10 in the `universal_nav` branch.
Document the changes made in the patch plan and test plan.
validations: Self-check completed: reviewed task requirements and confirmed understanding of the changes needed.
Validation of the patch will occur after implementation.

rubric_self_check.overall_notes: Missing detailed patch diff and test plan.
